title: Smart Data Models - OpenStreetMap / OSMClub
description: Social, sports, or interest-based clubs from OpenStreetMap tagged with club=*. This data model is a derivative work based on the OpenStreetMap Wiki, licensed under CC BY-SA 2.0 by OpenStreetMap contributors.

type.description: Property. NGSI Entity type. It has to be OSMClub

osmId.description: Property. The original OpenStreetMap element integer identifier. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Elements'

osmType.description: Property. The type of the original OpenStreetMap element.

osmLastModified.description: Property. Timestamp of the last modification of the OSM element. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Elements'

clubType.description: Property. The OSM club tag classifying the organization's focus. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:club'

operator.description: Property. The organization managing the club.

seeAlso.description: Property. List of URIs pointing to additional resources.
